deep_dive.title: Heterogeneity-Adaptive Diffusion Schrodinger Bridge for PET-Guided Whole-Body MRI Translation
deep_dive.abstract: While whole-body multimodal medical imaging scanners have been increasingly recognized for more effective medical applications, the excessive long acquisition time in PET-MR scanning is a major obstacle in more efficient clinical practice. Deep learning-based MRI translation provides a potential solution to reduce scan duration. However, current models often focus on specific anatomical regions and face challenges for whole-body scans that consists of highly heterogeneous feature distributions mainly due to (1) different anatomical regions across whole-body, and (2) lesions or pathological tissues. This paper tackles the challenges through a novel Heterogeneity-Adaptive Diffusion Schrodinger Bridge (HA-DSB) framework. By explicitly modeling translation as stochastic transport between source and target distributions, HA-DSB incorporates region context embeddings derived from a vision-language model (VLM) to enable region-specific modeling. To enhance fidelity of the pathological tissue, lesion-aware metabolic prior from PET is integrated directly into the bridge dynamics through a dual-stage guidance mechanism. Specifically, a PET-guided noise modulation module adaptively scales spatial diffusion perturbations during the forward process, while PET features are leveraged during the reverse process to selectively amplify lesion-relevant structures via an attention mechanism. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method across different body regions in whole-body MRI translation and show improved translation quality in lesion areas under PET guidance. Our code is available at Github.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Diffusion Schrodinger Bridge for medical image translation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于医学图像翻译的扩散薛定谔桥

deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于医学图像翻译的扩散薛定谔桥
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a Heterogeneity-Adaptive Diffusion Schrodinger Bridge (HA-DSB) for whole-body MRI translation from PET, addressing heterogeneous feature distributions across anatomical regions and lesions; achieves efficient translation without long acquisition times.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出异质性自适应扩散薛定谔桥（HA-DSB）框架，用于PET引导的全身MRI翻译，解决全身扫描中不同解剖区域和病变引起的异质性特征分布问题。通过扩散薛定谔桥实现跨模态高效翻译，显著减少扫描时间，为临床实践提供有效方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出异质性自适应扩散薛定谔桥（HA-DSB）框架，用于PET引导的全身MRI翻译，解决全身扫描中不同解剖区域和病变引起的异质性特征分布问题。通过扩散薛定谔桥实现跨模态高效翻译，显著减少扫描时间，为临床实践提供有效方案。
